response.justification: While this candidate possesses exceptional technical skills in TypeScript, React, and full-stack development, the fundamental issue is a catastrophic seniority mismatch. A Staff engineer with 30+ years of experience is applying for an explicitly entry-level position. This creates retention risk, compensation conflicts, and suggests misalignment with career expectations that no amount of technical fit can overcome.
strengths: Exceptional TypeScript and React expertise with proven production experience across multiple companies and products
Deep full-stack capability with explicit focus on software craftsmanship, TDD, and testing practices (relevant to clean architecture requirement)
Extensive systems design and infrastructure experience including DevOps, CI/CD, and distributed systems
concerns: Staff-level seniority applying for entry-level role signals retention risk and potential frustration with junior-level work assignments
PostgreSQL not explicitly mentioned despite job requirement—experience listed as MongoDB, MySQL, SQL generically, raising compatibility questions
AWS-specific services (ECS, EKS, RDS, S3, SQS, Terraform) not detailed in experience, though Docker and general infrastructure work mentioned
